enriched_points.expanded_content: Surveys gather insights from industry professionals about 3D printing innovations, assessing perceptions, challenges, and applications, as highlighted in various studies on construction technology.
Field observations involve direct examination of 3D printing processes on-site, enabling researchers to assess real-world applications, efficiencies, and outcomes of construction methods in practice.
Secondary data sources compile existing research, reports, and case studies on 3D printing in construction, providing a comprehensive overview of market trends and technological advancements.
